match: Barcelona vs Real Madrid - El Clasico 2024
summary: Barcelona beat Real Madrid 3-2 at the Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys, in a result that swung La Liga's title race firmly in Barcelona's favour. Real Madrid twice fought back from behind, but late goals from Lamine Yamal and Raphinha sealed the win for the hosts.

lines.text: Andreas Christensen capitalized on a corner from Raphinha to head home.
lines.label: neutral

lines.text: The game was marked by high tension.
